/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/projectile.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/projectile.dir/projectile.cpp.o -o projectile  -Wl,-rpath,/home/vendetta/github/data_structures/projectile/build/_deps/sfml-build/lib _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-graphics.so.2.6.1 _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-window.so.2.6.1 _deps/sfml-build/lib/libsfml-system.so.2.6.1
